name: internal-sites-template
description: Deploy an internal static site platform for your company. Employees drag-and-drop files to publish sites behind Cloudflare Access.

DISPATCH_NAMESPACE_API_TOKEN.description: API token with **Workers Scripts Edit** permission. [Create a Custom Token](https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens) with `Account > Workers Scripts > Edit` scoped to your account.

SITE_DOMAIN.description: Your company's internal domain, e.g. `internal-company.com`. Sites deploy to `site-name.internal-company.com`.
